interesting_fact: Japan has more than 5 million vending machines, selling everything from drinks to umbrellas.
India is the world’s largest democracy and has the second-largest population globally.
Australia is home to more kangaroos than humans.
Brazil is home to about 60% of the Amazon Rainforest.
Canada has the longest coastline of any country in the world.
Russia is the largest country in the world by land area, spanning 11 time zones.
Egypt is home to the Great Pyramid of Giza, the only surviving Wonder of the Ancient World.
France is the most visited country in the world by tourists.
South Korea has the fastest internet speed in the world.
Iceland has no standing army and is considered one of the most peaceful countries in the world.
